name: blueprint-v0
description: Modular orchestration system with state-driven migration, local AI integration, and execution verification
author: Hanzzel Corp

scripts.check:node: node --check runtime/main.js runtime/bus.js runtime/registry.js runtime/transforms.js runtime/logger.js runtime/config.js runtime/metrics.js runtime/schema_validator.js
scripts.check:py: python3 -m py_compile config.py logger.py metrics.py project_explainer.py health_check.py
scripts.test:node: npm run check:node && sh -c 'for f in modules/*/main.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done'
scripts.test:all: npm run test:node && npm run test:py && npm run smoke && npm run health
scripts.verify: npm run check:node && npm run check:py && npm run health
